| 12ms | 15ms | 18ms |\n| Vector search | 15ms | 35ms | 85ms |\n| Hybrid search | 45ms | 65ms | 150ms |\n| FTS5 search | 5ms | 8ms | 20ms |\n| Consolidation | 2s | 5s | 25s Batch Writes"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Bad: Individual writes\nfor item in items:\n  mem.remember(item)\n\n# Good: Batch transaction\nwith mem.transaction():\n  for item in items:\n      mem.remember(item)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"2.
